events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, lead singer of The Rolling Stones, was born on this day in 1943.

angles.name: Jagger's enduring energy
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still moving like Jagger! Wishing a very happy birthday to the iconic Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Remembering MTV's launch
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago, MTV changed music forever, kicking off with The Buggles. What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring iconic tracks like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock legacy
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people descended on a farm in New York for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: The music world remembers Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977, leaving behind an unparalleled musical legacy.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, we lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll. Elvis Presley's influence remains as strong as ever. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: The music world remembers guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His electrifying guitar work continues to inspire generations.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring the legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Christine Ellen Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, was born on this day in 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still fronting The Pretenders with that unmistakable voice.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, best known as the lead singer of Oasis, was born on this day in 1972.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing the rock 'n' roll attitude. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single turns 51 (UK)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK in 1975, becoming one of the most influential songs of the 20th century.

angles.name: Imagine 51st anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' became a UK single. A timeless message of peace that still resonates today.

events.title: The first iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple launched the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music players.

angles.name: iPod 25th anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod dropped and changed how we listened to music forever. What was on your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the UK premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Sixty-four years since 007 first hit the big screen. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary musician, singer, and songwriter John Lennon was born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire generations worldwide.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic English actor, comedian, and writer John Cleese was born on this day in 1939.

angles.name: John Cleese's birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the legendary John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British comedy genius.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their ninth studio album, 'The Beatles', commonly known as the 'White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles unveiled their ambitious 'White Album'. A double LP packed with some of their most diverse work.
